Introduction
    Cheap Flight!! is a TV movie starring Yûko Takeuchi, Erika Asakura, and Eiichirô Funakoshi. Miharu Aizawa (Yuko Takeuchi) receives an order to work for Cherry's Airlines from major airline. Cherry's Airlines is a low cost, budget...
